_meta.description: HTTP rate limit policy contract by endpoint family.

api.message: Too many requests from this IP, please try again later.

auth.message: Too many authentication attempts, please try again later.

two_factor.message: Too many 2FA attempts, please try again later.

ai.message: Too many AI requests, please slow down.

editing_apply.message: Too many edit apply requests, please slow down.

upload.message: Upload limit reached, please try again later.

presigned_url.message: Upload rate limit exceeded. Please wait before uploading more files.

multipart_upload.message: Multipart upload rate limit exceeded. Please wait before uploading more files.

download.message: Too many downloads, please slow down.

search.message: Too many search requests, please slow down.

pptx_preview.message: Too many PPTX preview requests, please slow down.

suspicious.message: Too many suspicious requests detected; access temporarily limited.

status_polling.message: Too many polling requests, please slow down.
